must_find.description: All database functions directly depend on rusqlite types (Connection, params!, Row) with no trait abstraction or repository layer, making driver swaps require rewriting every function
Positional row.get(N) column access is duplicated across get_issue, list_issues, get_issues_by_column, and search_issues with identical mapping logic instead of using a shared row-mapping function

must_not_flag.description: Inline SQL strings are acceptable for a direct database layer — using an ORM or query builder would add unnecessary complexity for this project's scale
Using synchronous rusqlite::Connection is intentional — the DbHandle wrapper provides async safety via spawn_blocking, so the inner FactoryDb does not need to be async
